Product: Odoo, Title: Navigate the dashboard
Avg Delay: indicates the average number of days... that completed deliveries were overdue
Avg Lead Time: indicates the average number of days between the creation and the validation of transfers
Fill rate: indicates the percentage of products delivered
When no backorder is created, this KPI decreases
Fill Rate by Demand: shows the percentage of products delivered
When no backorder is created, this KPI decreases
On Time Operations: indicates the percentage of transfers made on time
On Time rate by Demand: shows the percentage of transfers made on time
On Time rate by Demand: shows the percentage of transfers made on time by product
Internal lead time: shows the average time between the creation and the validation of transfers
Moves lines count by operation: shows the total number of completed stock move lines
Moves lines count by operation: shows the total number of completed stock move lines by operation type

entities.name: stock value
entities.mention: value across the most used locations

relations.evidence: filter the dashboard by product via the search bar
The value of stock depends on the valuation method used.
It enables monitoring of stock reservation levels
identification of products with negative stock
analysis of stock distribution and value
It also tracks important details like the creation date of stock
warehouse or purchasing managers can identify slow-moving or stagnant products
